original: There will eventually come a day when The New York Times ceases to publish stories on newsprint.
translation_literal: 终将有一天，《纽约时报》会停止在新闻纸上发表报道。

chunks.english: There will eventually come a day
when The New York Times ceases to publish stories on newsprint
chunks.chinese: 《纽约时报》停止在新闻纸上发表报道的

chunks.relation: when 定语从句内部主语
when 定语从句内部谓语

original: Exactly when that day will be is a matter of debate.
translation_literal: 那一天究竟会在何时，是一个有争议的问题。

chunks.english: Exactly when that day will be

original: “Sometime in the future,” the paper’s publisher said back in 2010.
translation_literal: 该报出版人在2010年曾说：“未来某个时候。”

original: Nostalgia for ink on paper and the rustle of pages aside, there’s plenty of incentive to ditch print.
translation_literal: 撇开对纸上油墨和翻页沙沙声的怀旧不谈，放弃印刷版有充足的动因。

chunks.english: Nostalgia for ink on paper and the rustle of pages aside
chunks.chinese: 撇开对纸上油墨和翻页声的怀旧不谈
chunks.relation: 独立结构，说明不考虑的情感因素

chunks.english: there is plenty of incentive to ditch print
chunks.chinese: 有充足的动因去放弃印刷版

chunks.english: plenty of incentive to ditch print
chunks.chinese: 充足的放弃印刷版的动因

sentence_patterns.explanation: Nostalgia... aside 是独立结构，意思是“撇开……不谈”。

original: The infrastructure required to make a physical newspaper — printing presses, delivery trucks — isn’t just expensive; it’s excessive at a time when online-only competitors don’t have the same set of financial constraints.
translation_literal: 制作实体报纸所需的基础设施——印刷机、送报卡车——不仅昂贵；在纯在线竞争者没有同样财务约束的时候，它还显得过度。

chunks.english: The infrastructure required to make a physical newspaper
chunks.chinese: 制作实体报纸所需的基础设施

chunks.english: required to make a physical newspaper
it is excessive at a time when online-only competitors don’t have the same set of financial constraints
chunks.chinese: 在纯在线竞争者没有同样财务约束时它显得过度

chunks.english: at a time when online-only competitors don’t have the same set of financial constraints
chunks.chinese: 在纯在线竞争者没有同样财务约束的时候
chunks.relation: 说明 excessive 的时代背景

chunks.english: when online-only competitors don’t have the same set of financial constraints
chunks.chinese: 纯在线竞争者没有同样财务约束的

chunks.relation: when 定语从句内部主语
when 定语从句内部谓语

chunks.english: the same set of financial constraints

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主语 + 破折号举例 + 谓语
sentence_patterns.explanation: printing presses, delivery trucks 是破折号插入的举例说明。

original: Readers are migrating away from print anyway.
translation_literal: 无论如何，读者正在离开印刷版。

chunks.relation: 作 migrate away from 的对象
说明趋势不受其他因素影响

original: And though print ad sales still dwarf their online and mobile counterparts, revenue from print is still declining.
translation_literal: 并且，尽管印刷广告销售额仍使在线和移动端对应收入相形见绌，印刷版收入仍在下降。

chunks.english: though print ad sales still dwarf their online and mobile counterparts
chunks.chinese: 尽管印刷广告销售额仍远超在线和移动端对应收入
其在线和移动端对应收入

original: Overhead may be high and circulation lower, but rushing to eliminate its print edition would be a mistake, says BuzzFeed CEO Jonah Peretti.
translation_literal: BuzzFeed首席执行官乔纳·佩雷蒂说，运营开销可能很高、发行量可能较低，但急于取消其印刷版将是一个错误。

chunks.english: Overhead may be high and circulation lower
chunks.chinese: 运营开销可能很高且发行量较低

chunks.relation: 与 Overhead may be high 并列，省略 may be

chunks.english: but rushing to eliminate its print edition would be a mistake
chunks.chinese: 但急于取消其印刷版会是错误

chunks.english: rushing to eliminate its print edition

chunks.chinese: BuzzFeed首席执行官乔纳·佩雷蒂说

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: A may be high and B lower
sentence_patterns.explanation: circulation lower 省略了 may be。

original: Peretti says the Times shouldn’t waste time getting out of the print business, but only if they go about doing it the right way.
translation_literal: 佩雷蒂说，《纽约时报》不应浪费时间退出印刷业务，但前提是他们以正确方式去做这件事。

chunks.english: the Times shouldn’t waste time getting out of the print business
chunks.chinese: 《纽约时报》不应浪费时间退出印刷业务

chunks.english: getting out of the print business
chunks.relation: 说明 waste time 的内容

chunks.english: but only if they go about doing it the right way
chunks.chinese: 但只有当他们以正确方式去做时
chunks.relation: 补充限制前面建议成立的条件

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.explanation: but only if 引出限制条件，说明不是简单退出印刷业务，而是要用正确方式退出。

original: “Figuring out a way to accelerate that transition would make sense for them,” he said, “but if you discontinue it, you’re going to have your most loyal customers really upset with you.”
translation_literal: 他说：“想出一种加速这一转型的方法对他们来说是合理的，但如果你中止它，你将会让你最忠诚的顾客非常不满。”

chunks.english: Figuring out a way to accelerate that transition
chunks.chinese: 想出一种加速这一转型的方法

chunks.relation: 说明 make sense 的对象

chunks.english: but if you discontinue it, you’re going to have your most loyal customers really upset with you
chunks.chinese: 但如果你中止它你会让最忠诚顾客非常不满
chunks.relation: 与前一判断形成转折警告
补充说明 customers 的状态

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 引语 + he said + 引语
sentence_patterns.explanation: he said 插在直接引语中间，阅读时应连接前后引语内容。

original: Sometimes that’s worth making a change anyway.
translation_literal: 有时候，无论如何那都值得做出改变。

chunks.relation: 作 worth 的宾语内容

original: Peretti gives the example of Netflix discontinuing its DVD-mailing service to focus on streaming.
translation_literal: 佩雷蒂举了Netflix停止其DVD邮寄服务以专注于流媒体的例子。

chunks.english: the example of Netflix discontinuing its DVD-mailing service
chunks.chinese: Netflix停止其DVD邮寄服务的例子

chunks.relation: 说明停止DVD邮寄服务的目的

original: “It was seen as a blunder,” he said.
translation_literal: 他说：“这曾被视为一个失误。”

chunks.relation: 说明 It 被看作什么

original: The move turned out to be foresighted.
translation_literal: 这一举措后来证明是有远见的。

chunks.relation: 作 turned out to be 的表语

original: And if Peretti were in charge at the Times?
translation_literal: 那么，如果佩雷蒂掌管《纽约时报》呢？

chunks.english: if Peretti were in charge at the Times
chunks.chinese: 如果佩雷蒂掌管《纽约时报》

original: “I wouldn’t pick a year to end print,” he said.
translation_literal: 他说：“我不会选定某一年结束印刷版。”

original: “I would raise prices and make it into more of a legacy product.”
translation_literal: “我会提高价格，并把它变成更像一种遗产产品的东西。”

chunks.english: into more of a legacy product
chunks.chinese: 变成更像一种遗产产品的东西
chunks.relation: 补充说明 it 的结果状态

original: The most loyal customers would still get the product they favor, the idea goes, and they’d feel like they were helping sustain the quality of something they believe in.
translation_literal: 这种想法是，最忠诚的顾客仍会得到他们偏爱的产品，而且他们会觉得自己在帮助维持他们所相信之物的质量。

chunks.english: The most loyal customers would still get the product they favor
chunks.chinese: 最忠诚的顾客仍会得到他们偏爱的产品

chunks.relation: 插入说明这是观点表述

chunks.english: and they would feel like they were helping sustain the quality of something they believe in
chunks.chinese: 而且他们会觉得自己在帮助维持所信之物的质量

chunks.english: they were helping sustain the quality of something they believe in
chunks.chinese: 他们在帮助维持他们所信之物的质量
chunks.relation: 作 feel like 的宾语

chunks.english: the quality of something they believe in

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主句, the idea goes, and 主句
sentence_patterns.explanation: the idea goes 是插入语，说明这是对策略逻辑的转述。

original: “So if you’re overpaying for print, you could feel like you were helping,” Peretti said.
translation_literal: 佩雷蒂说：“所以，如果你为印刷版支付过高费用，你可能会觉得自己是在帮忙。”

chunks.english: if you are overpaying for print
chunks.chinese: 如果你为印刷版支付过高费用
chunks.relation: 说明感觉自己在帮忙的条件
作 feel like 的宾语

original: “Then increase it at a higher rate each year and essentially try to generate additional revenue.”
translation_literal: “然后每年以更高幅度提高它，并基本上试图产生额外收入。”

chunks.english: at a higher rate each year

original: In other words, if you’re going to make a print product, make it for the people who are already obsessed with it.
translation_literal: 换句话说，如果你要制作印刷产品，就为那些已经对它着迷的人制作。

chunks.relation: 说明后文是换一种说法

chunks.english: if you are going to make a print product
chunks.chinese: 如果你要制作印刷产品
chunks.relation: 说明祈使句成立的条件

chunks.english: make it for the people who are already obsessed with it
chunks.chinese: 为那些已经对它着迷的人制作它

chunks.english: for the people who are already obsessed with it
chunks.chinese: 为那些已经对它着迷的人

chunks.english: who are already obsessed with it

chunks.relation: 作 obsessed with 的宾语

original: Which may be what the Times is doing already.
translation_literal: 这可能正是《纽约时报》已经在做的事。

chunks.english: what the Times is doing already
chunks.relation: 作 may be 的表语
what 表语从句内部主语
what 表语从句内部谓语

original: Getting the print edition seven days a week costs nearly $500 a year — more than twice as much as a digital-only subscription.
translation_literal: 每周七天获得印刷版每年花费近500美元，是纯数字订阅费用的两倍多。

chunks.english: Getting the print edition seven days a week
more than twice as much as a digital-only subscription
chunks.chinese: 是纯数字订阅费用的两倍多
chunks.relation: 破折号后补充说明价格水平

original: “It’s a really hard thing to do and it’s a tremendous luxury that BuzzFeed doesn’t have a legacy business,” Peretti remarked.
translation_literal: 佩雷蒂评论道：“这是一件非常难做的事，而且BuzzFeed没有传统业务是一个巨大的奢侈。”

chunks.english: It is a really hard thing to do
chunks.chinese: 这是一件非常难做的事

chunks.english: a really hard thing to do
and it is a tremendous luxury that BuzzFeed doesn’t have a legacy business
chunks.chinese: 而且BuzzFeed没有传统业务是一种巨大奢侈

chunks.relation: 第二并列分句形式主语

chunks.english: that BuzzFeed doesn’t have a legacy business

chunks.relation: 真正主语从句内部主语
真正主语从句内部谓语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: it is + n. + that 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: 第二个 it 是形式主语，真正主语是 that BuzzFeed doesn’t have a legacy business。

original: “But we’re going to have questions like that where we have things we’re doing that don’t make sense when the market changes and the world changes.
translation_literal: “但我们将会遇到类似那样的问题，在那些问题中，我们有一些正在做的事情，而当市场和世界发生变化时，这些事情不再有意义。”

chunks.english: where we have things we’re doing that don’t make sense when the market changes and the world changes
chunks.chinese: 在那些问题中我们有正在做但在市场和世界变化时不再有意义的事情

chunks.english: things we’re doing that don’t make sense when the market changes and the world changes
chunks.chinese: 我们正在做但在市场和世界变化时不再有意义的事情

chunks.english: that don’t make sense when the market changes and the world changes
chunks.chinese: 在市场和世界变化时不再有意义的

chunks.english: when the market changes and the world changes
chunks.chinese: 当市场和世界发生变化时
chunks.relation: 说明没有意义的时间条件
when 从句内部并列主语

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: things + 定语从句 + 定语从句 + when 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: things 后连续接多个修饰结构，是本句理解难点。

original: In those situations, it’s better to be more aggressive than less aggressive.”
translation_literal: 在那些情况下，更激进比不那么激进更好。

chunks.english: to be more aggressive than less aggressive
chunks.chinese: 更激进而不是不那么激进

sentence_patterns.explanation: it 是形式主语，真正主语是 to be more aggressive...。
